title: cerastium luridum
intro: Cerastium luridum, also known as sticky mouse-ear or sticky chickweed, is a type of flowering plant in the carnation family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Cerastium luridum include its ability to treat wounds, reduce pain and inflammation, and soothe skin irritations. Cerastium luridum can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
